questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed served as which President of India?
questions.explanation: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed was the fifth President of India.

questions.q: In which year did Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed become President of India?
questions.explanation: He became the fifth President of India in 1974.

questions.q: How did Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed's tenure as President end in 1977?
questions.explanation: He died in office in 1977 before completing his full term.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed was the second person of which background to become President of India?
questions.explanation: He was the second Muslim to hold the office of President of India.

questions.q: Whom did Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed succeed as President of India?
questions.explanation: He succeeded V.V. Giri as the fifth President in 1974.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed served as the constitutional head of which country?
questions.explanation: He served as the President of the Republic of India.

questions.q: In which year did Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed pass away while in office?
questions.explanation: He died in office in February 1977.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed was the President who held office during the years immediately following 1974. He was preceded in that office by how many earlier Presidents?
questions.explanation: As the fifth President, he was preceded by four earlier Presidents of India.

questions.q: Before becoming President, Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed held positions in which branch of the Union government?
questions.explanation: He served as a Union Cabinet Minister before becoming President.

questions.q: Which region of India is associated with Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed's political base and family roots?
questions.explanation: He had strong roots in Assam and represented constituencies in that region.

questions.q: Who became Acting President following the death of Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed in 1977?
questions.explanation: Vice-President B.D. Jatti served as Acting President after Ahmed's death in 1977.

questions.q: Who was elected to succeed Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed as the next regular President of India in 1977?
questions.explanation: Neelam Sanjiva Reddy became the sixth President of India later in 1977.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed's presidency overlapped with the tenure of which Prime Minister?
questions.explanation: He was President from 1974 to 1977, during Indira Gandhi's tenure as Prime Minister.

questions.q: Before becoming President, Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed held which economic portfolio in the Union Cabinet?
questions.explanation: He served as Union Minister for Food and Agriculture, among other portfolios.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed was the second President of India to do which of the following?
questions.explanation: He was the second Indian President to die while in office, after Zakir Husain.

questions.q: Which House of Parliament or legislature did Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed serve in as an elected representative before his presidency?
questions.explanation: He was an elected member of the Lok Sabha and held ministerial office before becoming President.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed pursued his higher education, including law, in which country?
questions.explanation: He studied at Cambridge and was called to the Bar in England.

questions.q: Before joining the Union Cabinet, Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed held ministerial office in the government of which state?
questions.explanation: He served as a minister in the government of Assam before moving to national politics.

questions.q: Under the Constitution, the office of President held by Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed is elected for a term of how many years?
questions.explanation: The President of India holds office for a term of five years.

questions.q: As President, Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed was also the supreme commander of which institution?
questions.explanation: The President of India is the supreme commander of the armed forces.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed became President after a presidential election held in which year?
questions.explanation: He was elected in the 1974 presidential election.

questions.q: The President's official residence, occupied by Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed during his tenure, is which building?
questions.explanation: Rashtrapati Bhavan is the official residence of the President of India.

questions.q: In which year was Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed born?
questions.explanation: He was born on 13 May 1905.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed studied at which English university before his legal training?
questions.explanation: He studied at the University of Cambridge in England.

questions.q: Besides Food and Agriculture, Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed also held which legal portfolio in the Union Cabinet at one stage?
questions.explanation: He held the portfolio of Law and Justice among his Union Cabinet responsibilities.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed's tenure as President fell partly within which constitutional period proclaimed in 1975?
questions.explanation: A national Emergency was in force from 1975, during his presidency, before being lifted in 1977.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed was elected to the Lok Sabha representing a constituency in which state?
questions.explanation: He represented a constituency in Assam in the Lok Sabha.

questions.q: Among the first five Presidents of India, Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed was the second to die in office; who was the first to do so?
questions.explanation: Zakir Husain, the third President, was the first to die in office, in 1969.

questions.q: Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed was admitted to the Bar at one of the Inns of Court in which city?
questions.explanation: He was called to the Bar in London after his studies in England.

questions.q: The President's office held by Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed is filled through an electoral college that includes elected members of which bodies?
options: The Supreme Court and High Courts
questions.explanation: The President is elected by an electoral college of elected members of both Houses of Parliament and the state legislative assemblies.
